race.comment: REGGIO CALABRIA (1) is aiming for the hat-trick after bolting in here last time out. He was a strong winner over this course and distance two back, negotiating the wide draw that time around as well. Rises in weight here, but if he can hold his form, it's hard to see anything turning the tables. NAILED'EM (4) looks a 3YO on the rise, jumping favourite ahead of REGGIO CALABRIA last start but finishing behind him. The wide draw is the query, though 1100m looks to suit him much better. Wouldn't surprise to see him go to the front and be hard to run down. BANNERED (3) drops back in trip today after tiring at Belmont last start. Needs some luck from the alley, but his form earlier this campaign rates highly. Can win if he can recapture that form. CASSENITE (5) was too good over this trip at Bunbury most recently and can feature again. INSYDE SUCCESS (2) can't be discounted on his recent efforts.
